# Portal.view.home.parts.How: update the description text

@maxrahder 

> your app logic isn't affected by DOM changes or by Ajax or socket calls.

DOM changes won't affect our app logic in a noticeable way. It is the opposite direction which matters:

> DOM updates are not affected by your app logic and transitions always run smooth
